backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Nellore Print Hub backend, defining all data types (quotations, projects, reviews, chat, admin users, delivery) and initializing shared state maps with blob storage and authorization mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (admin dashboard contact info link, public gallery, project detail modal, admin icon navigation, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summary catalog describing the purpose of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference for hooks, pages, and components.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, chart palette, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Nellore Print Hub', mounting the app at `#root` and loading the TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root TanStack Router configuration defining all application routes (public and admin), wrapping them in a RootLayout that conditionally shows a ProfileSetup dialog for authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts children to authenticated admin users, showing loading states, access-denied cards, or first-admin registration prompts based on auth and admin-existence checks.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Renders a fixed mobile bottom navigation bar with links to main app routes and a chat button, showing a lock indicator on the reviews tab when the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheet.tsx: A modal bottom sheet component that slides up from the bottom of the screen, locks body scroll while open, and optionally displays a title with a close button.
frontend/src/components/BottomSheetSelec: A form select component that opens a BottomSheet with a list of options, triggering haptic feedback on selection and displaying the chosen value in a button trigger.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: A floating chat widget that allows authenticated users to send and view messages, displaying a login prompt for unauthenticated users and sorting messages chronologically.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A small toggle button that switches the app language between English and Telugu, using haptic feedback on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout wrapper providing a sticky header with logo, language toggle, share button, and admin access icon, plus a footer and bottom navigation with an integrated chat widget.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, showing a loading spinner during authentication and clearing the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/NegotiationHisto: Displays a scrollable chat-style history of negotiation messages between a customer and admin, with distinct styling for each sender.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: A modal dialog form for new users to enter their name, email, and mobile number, saving the profile via a mutation hook with validation and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectDetailMod: A modal dialog component that displays detailed information about a project, including its image, title, category badge, description, and completion date, with bilingual (English/Telugu) support.
frontend/src/components/PullToRefreshCon: A wrapper component that adds pull-to-refresh functionality to its children using touch events, showing a spinner indicator during pulling and refreshing states.
frontend/src/components/ShareAppButton.t: A button component that shares the app URL using the Web Share API or falls back to clipboard copy, with bilingual label support and haptic feedback.
frontend/src/components/SkeletonCard.tsx: A skeleton loading placeholder component that renders animated shimmer cards in four variants: project, review, quotation, and a default service layout.
frontend/src/components/SwipeContainer.t: A wrapper component that enables horizontal swipe-based navigation by applying a translateX transform during touch swipe gestures using the useSwipeNavigation hook.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: A React context provider that manages the app's language state (English or Telugu), persisting the selection to localStorage and exposing toggle and set functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdmin.ts: A hook that queries the backend to check whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges, returning loading and fetched state alongside the boolean result.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: A hook that exposes a mutation for verifying admin email/password credentials by SHA-256 hashing the password before calling the backend's verifyAuthentication method.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminExists.ts: A hook that queries the backend admin user count to determine whether any admin account exists, exposing the result as a boolean adminExists field.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminInvitations.t: Provides hooks for fetching existing admin invitations and creating new ones by hashing the password before calling the backend's inviteAdminUser method.
A hook that exposes a mutation to register the first admin user, invalidating and refetching admin-related queries on success and showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useBiometricAuth.ts: Provides hooks for WebAuthn-based biometric login and registration, checking device support and calling the backend to register biometric credentials.
frontend/src/hooks/useChat.ts: Provides React Query hooks for sending chat messages, fetching all messages, posting owner replies, and retrieving per-customer chat history from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useCompanyLogo.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching (`useGetCompanyLogo`) and updating (`useSetCompanyLogo`) the company logo via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useContactInfo.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching (`useGetContactInfo`) and updating (`useUpdateContactInfo`) contact information via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useDelivery.ts: Provides React Query hooks for retrieving delivery config, calculating delivery fees, and updating delivery config (per-km rate and minimum fee) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, and identity state to React components.
frontend/src/hooks/useNegotiation.ts: Provides a mutation hook (`useRespondToNegotiation`) to submit a negotiation response for a quotation and invalidates related quotation queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useOfficeLocation.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching (`useGetOfficeLocation`) and setting (`useSetOfficeLocation`) the office location via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjects.ts: Provides React Query hooks for CRUD operations on projects, including fetching all projects or by category, and adding, editing, or deleting a project via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/usePullToRefresh.ts: Implements a pull-to-refresh gesture hook that tracks touch events, measures pull distance against a threshold, and triggers an async refresh callback.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationFile.ts: Provides a query hook (`useGetQuotationFile`) that fetches the file blob associated with a specific quotation by searching all quotations.
Provides a mutation hook (`useQuotationResponse`) to handle admin responses to quotations (accept/reject/negotiate) and invalidates quotation caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotations.ts: Provides a comprehensive set of React Query hooks for quotation management, including fetching all/user quotations, creating quotations, adding details, approving, and retrieving overdue quotations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQuotationStatistic: Provides a query hook (`useQuotationStatistics`) that fetches counts of quotations by status (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating) with 30-second polling.
frontend/src/hooks/useReviews.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all reviews, filtering by rating, and adding new reviews via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSwipeNavigation.ts: Implements horizontal swipe gesture navigation between a predefined set of page routes using TanStack Router, tracking touch events and navigating on threshold-exceeding swipes.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserProfile.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching (`useGetCallerUserProfile`) and saving (`useSaveCallerUserProfile`) the current authenticated user's profile via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH color values, plus utility classes for shimmer animations, safe-area padding, and scrollbar hiding.
frontend/src/lib/blobStorage.ts: Wrapper class around the backend ExternalBlob type that exposes methods for getting bytes, direct URLs, upload progress tracking, and static factory methods for creating blobs from URLs or byte arrays.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component that displays a hero section with background image, a grid of benefit cards with icons, and a commitment section, all using translated strings from the language context.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminDashboardP: Admin dashboard showing quotation statistics (pending, accepted, rejected, negotiating), an overdue-quotations alert, and quick-link cards to key admin sections. Wrapped in AdminGuard for access control.
Admin login page supporting email/password, biometric (WebAuthn), and Internet Identity authentication methods, with first-admin registration flow when no admin exists yet.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminRegistrati: Form page for creating a new admin account with email, password, and confirm-password fields including validation; submits via the invite-admin mutation and redirects to login on success.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminUserManage: Admin page for listing existing admin users and inviting new ones via a dialog form with email and password fields. Wrapped in AdminGuard and uses the admin invitations hooks.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ChatManagementP: Admin page that displays all customer chat messages grouped by email, allowing admins to expand conversations and send replies via a textarea input.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ContactInfoMana: Admin form page for viewing and updating company contact information (email, phone, physical address, Google Maps link) with bilingual (English/Telugu) labels.
frontend/src/pages/admin/DeliveryConfigM: Admin form page for configuring delivery pricing, specifically the per-km rate and minimum fee stored in paise but displayed in rupees, with bilingual support.
frontend/src/pages/admin/LogoManagementP: Admin page for uploading and displaying the company logo, supporting image file selection with size validation, upload progress tracking, and preview before submission.
frontend/src/pages/admin/ProjectManageme: Admin page for managing portfolio projects with full CRUD operations, supporting image uploads with progress tracking, and a dialog form for adding or editing project details including title, description, and service category.
frontend/src/pages/admin/QuotationManage: Admin page for managing quotation requests, allowing admins to view, add pricing details, approve quotations, respond to negotiations, and upload/download reply files. Includes per-quotation cards with expandable details, status indicators, and overdue highlighting.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUsPage.tsx: Contact page that fetches contact info from a hook and displays quick-action buttons for WhatsApp and phone calls, plus info cards for email, phone, and address with map link support.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryInfoPage.tsx: Delivery information page that shows per-km rate and minimum fee fetched from a config hook, and includes an interactive fee calculator where users input a distance to get an estimated delivery cost.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page with a hero section, feature highlights grid, and services grid, using translated strings and navigating to quote/gallery routes; wrapped in swipe and pull-to-refresh containers.
frontend/src/pages/MyQuotationsPage.tsx: Page listing the current user's quotation requests, with each card showing service type, status badge, and an expandable details section displaying price, description, terms, and any admin reply file download link.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectGalleryPage.ts: Displays a filterable gallery of projects with category tabs and pull-to-refresh support. Admins can upload new projects via a dialog with image preview, title, description, and category fields.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationConfirmation: Shows a success confirmation screen after a quotation is submitted, displaying the quotation ID and a numbered list of next steps. Provides navigation buttons to view quotations or return home.
Form page for customers to submit a quotation request, including service type, deadline, project details, contact info, and an optional file attachment with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/QuotationResponsePage: Displays the customer's quotation list with per-card details fetched from the actor, allowing them to accept, reject, or negotiate each quotation and download attached files.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Renders an expandable list of service categories (design, digital, outdoor, indoor, screen printing, offset) with bilingual labels and item lists, each category collapsible via chevron toggle.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitReviewPage.tsx: Form page for customers to submit a star-rated review with name, review text, project type, and an optional image upload, navigating to the testimonials page on success.
frontend/src/pages/TestimonialsPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, filterable list of user reviews with star-rating filters, pull-to-refresh, and skeleton loading states. Requires authentication to view; unauthenticated users see a login prompt.
frontend/src/translations/en.ts: English translation strings for the entire frontend application, covering common UI labels, navigation, and all page-specific text for home, services, contact, gallery, reviews, and more.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Re-exports English and Telugu translation objects and their shared type, and provides a `getTranslations` helper that returns the correct translation set based on the selected language.
frontend/src/translations/te.ts: Telugu translation strings mirroring the structure of `en.ts`, providing localized text for all UI sections of the application.
frontend/src/utils/haptics.ts: Provides haptic feedback utilities using the browser Vibration API, exposing named patterns (tap, success, error, select) and a convenience `hapticFeedback` function.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support to maintain values across navigation.
frontend/src/utils/webauthn.ts: WebAuthn helper functions for checking platform authenticator support, registering and authenticating credentials via the browser's PublicKeyCredential API, and converting between ArrayBuffer and Base64.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, secondary, sidebar, chart, etc.), custom fonts (Inter, Poppins), border radius, box shadows, and keyframe animations for accordion and fade-in effects. Includes typography, container-queries, and tailwindcss-animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file describing a service/business web app with admin and customer-facing features, listing existing implemented features (contact info editing, public project gallery, project detail modal, admin icon navigation) and new pending feature requests.
